name: R-18 (SS-95)
events: 10 Mar 1942 USS R-18 shifted from New London, Connecticut to Naval Torpedo Station, Newport, Rhode Island to participate in special tests.
19 Mar 1942 USS R-18 returned to New London, Connecticut from Newport, Rhode Island.
19 May 1942 USS R-18 departed New London, Connecticut for a patrol to the north of Bermuda.
10 Dec 1942 USS R-18 departed Trinidad for St. Thomas, Virgin Islands.
13 Dec 1942 USS R-18 arrived at St. Thomas, Virgin Islands from Trinidad.
16 Dec 1942 USS R-18 departed St. Thomas, Virgin Islands for New London, Connecticut.
24 Dec 1942 USS R-18 arrived at New London, Connecticut from St. Thomas, Virgin Islands for a period of repairs.
11 Apr 1943 USS R-18 departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
12 Apr 1943 USS R-18 arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
5 May 1943 USS R-18 departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
6 May 1943 USS R-18 arrived at New London, Connecticut from Casco Bay, Maine.
11 Jun 1943 USS R-18 departed New London, Connecticut for Bermuda.
15 Jun 1943 USS R-18 arrived at Bermuda from New London, Connecticut.
15 Apr 1945 USS R-18 departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.
22 Apr 1945 USS R-18 arrived at Key West, Florida.
24 Apr 1945 USS R-18 conducted exercises off Key West.
30 Apr 1945 USS R-18 conducted exercises off Key West.

16 May 1945 USS R-18 departed Key West, Florida for Port Everglades, Florida.
17 May 1945 USS R-18 arrived at Port Everglades, Florida.
20 Jun 1945 USS R-18 departed Port Everglades, Florida for Key West, Florida.
21 Jun 1945 USS R-18 arrived at Key West, Florida from Port Everglades, Florida.
27 Jun 1945 USS R-18 is put on the slipway at Key West.
29 Jun 1945 USS R-18 is put back in the water.

5 Aug 1945 USS R-18 departed Key West, Florida for Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
8 Aug 1945 USS R-18 arrived at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba from Key West, Florida.
28 Aug 1945 USS R-18 departed Guantanamo Bay, Cuba for Key West, Florida.
30 Aug 1945 USS R-18 arrived at Key West, Florida from Guantanamo Bay, Cuba.
2 Sep 1945 USS R-18 departed Key West, Florida for the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
8 Sep 1945 USS R-18 arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from Key West, Florida for decommissioning.
19 Sep 1945 USS R-18 was decommissioned at the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
